resources.string:
To enable short video list playback, it is recommended to use the Alibaba Cloud Short Drama Solution directly.

This solution consists of the client-side AUI components and the server-side VodAppServer, covering the complete short drama business workflow from content management and distribution to playback. With integrated frontend and backend design, it allows you to quickly build an operable short drama application without developing your own backend services, significantly reducing development cost and time to market.

Note: The feature source code and sample projects related to short drama are provided only after the purchase of the Professional Edition License of the SDK.

For more information about Professional Edition features, licensing, or integration details, please contact the PDSA pre-sales technical support team for further assistance.

👉 Learn more about the Alibaba Cloud Short Drama Solution
